pages.text: In order to make the anvil process smoother, this mod has completed some of the features that the vanilla should have.

pages.name: Completion of Cauldrons
pages.text: Complete the missing cauldron layers in the vanilla.

pages.name: Dispensers Operate Cauldrons
pages.text: The dispenser uses water bottles, empty bottles, lava buckets, powder snow buckets, water buckets and empty buckets to interact with the cauldron.

Dispensers Interact with Mobs: $(li)The dispenser can use iron ingots to repair iron golem $(li)and can use buckets to interact with cow to receive milk. $(li)get a mushroom pot by firing a bowl at a $(item)mooshroom$() $(li)Launch golden apples to cure $(item)weak zombie villagers$()

pages.title: 炼药锅输出口
pages.text: 持$(l:power/introduction#anvil_hammer)铁砧锤$()右键炼药锅侧面生成$(item)炼药锅输出口$() $(li)一个锅最多有一个输出口 $(li)自动输出加工产物

pages.title: 铁砧修补术
pages.text: 手持铁块潜行右键可以修复铁砧。
